description_long: This is a tall, rectangular ceramic cup with a unique, elongated handle that curves outward and attaches at both the top and bottom of the cup. The main body is predominantly white with a thin gold rim at the top and bottom edges, giving it a refined appearance. One side features a detailed, colored illustration of a classical building surrounded by greenery, adding a decorative and possibly commemorative touch. The handle is a contrasting light beige or gold color, smoothly integrated into the cup's design. The cup's surface is glossy and smooth, typical of glazed ceramics, and the interior is likely hollow and similarly finished. There are no visible logos or text, but the artwork is prominent and visually distinctive.
description: A tall, rectangular white ceramic cup with a gold-trimmed rim, a unique curved handle, and a decorative building illustration on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative building illustration and the full profile of the curved handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated handle's attachment points and the cup's narrow profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white back of the cup and the handle's full curve.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cup's narrow edge with a partial glimpse of the decorative motif.
